variants: Currently residing in Cresthill Fen, Leonor Grandal was born in Lanternmere Harbor. She pursued her legal education at the Verdigris School of Law, and after graduation began her career at Westfork Mercantile. There, she has distinguished herself and garnered respect within her field. In recognition of her outstanding contributions, Leonor received the Lanternbranch Honor, which underscores her dedication to her profession and community.
